question: Veritabanında kaç müşteri var?
sql: SELECT count(*) AS client_count FROM credit_clients;

question: Genel temerrüt oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate FROM credit_clients;

question: Eğitim düzeyine göre temerrüt oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT education, round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY education ORDER BY default_rate DESC;

question: Yaş gruplarına göre temerrüt oranı nasıl değişiyor?
sql: SELECT width_bucket(age, 20, 80, 6) AS age_bucket, round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY age_bucket ORDER BY age_bucket;

question: Kredi limiti dilimine göre temerrüt oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT width_bucket(credit_limit, 0, 1000000, 10) AS limit_bucket, round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY limit_bucket ORDER BY limit_bucket;

question: Cinsiyete göre temerrüt oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT sex, round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY sex ORDER BY sex;

question: Eylül ayındaki gecikme durumuna göre temerrüt oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT pay_sep, round(avg(CASE WHEN defaulted THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS default_rate, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY pay_sep ORDER BY pay_sep;

question: Medeni duruma göre ortalama kredi limiti nedir?
sql: SELECT marriage, round(avg(credit_limit), 2) AS avg_limit, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY marriage ORDER BY avg_limit DESC;

question: Temerrüde düşenlerle düşmeyenlerin ortalama yaşı nedir?
sql: SELECT defaulted, round(avg(age), 1) AS avg_age, count(*) AS n FROM credit_clients GROUP BY defaulted ORDER BY defaulted;

question: En yüksek kredi limitli 10 müşteri kimler?
sql: SELECT client_id, credit_limit, age, education FROM credit_clients ORDER BY credit_limit DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Ortalama eylül ekstre borcu nedir?
sql: SELECT round(avg(bill_sep), 2) AS avg_bill_sep FROM credit_clients;

question: Eylülde en az 1 ay gecikmesi olan müşterilerin oranı nedir?
sql: SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN pay_sep >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 4) AS delayed_share FROM credit_clients;
